title: Redeploy AI Image Studio app

requirements.text: Redeploy the full AI Image Studio application (backend and frontend) in its current state, ensuring the Motoko backend actor with Hugging Face HTTP outcalls and the React frontend with image generation form, display, and prompt history are all fully functional.
acceptanceCriteria: The app loads without errors in the browser
The image generation form renders correctly with all fields (art style, emotion, lighting, pose, etc.)
The backend responds to image generation requests
Prompt history displays previously generated prompts
No 'Not Found' or deployment errors appear

constraints: Do not change any existing logic or UI — this is a straight redeploy of the existing codebase
Preserve the charcoal+amber studio theme defined in frontend/src/index.css
Do not modify immutable frontend paths
